'''RW957''' was a [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtrooper]] assigned to [[Jerec (Inquisitor)|Jerec's]] fleet in [[5 ABY/Legends|5 ABY]]. He was [[Death/Legends|killed]] on [[Ruusan/Legends|Ruusan]].

==History==
RW957 was one of the Stormtrooper [[squad/Legends|squad]] assigned to [[Patrol 341]] in the [[skimmer/Legends|skimmer]] [[Zeta 19|Z-19]]. Their leader, [[Lieutenant/Legends|Lieutenant]] [[Aagon]], suggested to abandon their orders and hunt the native [[bouncer]]s. During that attempt they were attacked by [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebels]] who wished to protect the natives.<ref name="JK">''[[Dark Forces: Jedi Knight]]''</ref>

Aagon ordered the skimmer landed, the troops exited and hid behind some rocks; as the skimmer left to round the Rebels, Aagon with six troopers he pressed forward. RW957 was at the end of the column. He felt protected, but he didn't know that some Rebels secretly sneaked behind them. He heard the rustling of clothes, when he felt an arm around his neck. Someone removed his helmet and he saw the [[Three Sisters|moonlight]] reflected on a blade. He didn't have the time to shout for help.<ref name="JK" />

After the eradication of the team, the Rebels buried them and appropriated or hid their equipment, with their graves camouflaged by rocks. However a couple of [[standard day/Legends|days]] Jerec's forces were alerted by their absence and [[Yun]] was sent to the desert to find out what happened. A [[company/Legends|company]] of Stormtroopers and the ground pounders searched the area and reported the finding of RW957's [[Stormtrooper armor/Legends|helmet]] to Yun, confirming his theory that Aagon led them away from their authorized zone to hunt Bouncers.<ref name="JK" /><ref name="Dark Forces: Jedi Knight audio drama">[[Dark Forces: Jedi Knight (audio drama)|''Dark Forces: Jedi Knight'' audio drama]]</ref>

==Personality and traits==
RW957 valued his life and had plans to ensure the best and safest positions within his job. Whenever it was possible he preferred to occupy the last position, the least likely to fall into a trap, be attacked or ordered forward, or hit by his rear companion.<ref name="JK" /> 

==Behind the scenes==
RW957 appears briefly in the novella ''[[Dark Forces: Jedi Knight]]'' where his last thoughts are exposed, and it is his helmet that is later found, which Yun confirms by checking his [[Datapad/Legends|datapad]]. In the [[Dark Forces: Jedi Knight (audio drama)|audio adaptation]] only the discovery of his helmet is described in dialogue and it is [[Momo]] who confirms that it belonged to a member of the patrol based on the designation number, which is not mentioned. According to the dialogue it was "shot through by a blaster bolt" contrasting the novella that suggests that his throat was cut with a knife.
